infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: RoundFit reads your health data to track steps, workouts, and active calories so you never have to log them manually.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: RoundFit can write body weight and nutrition entries to Apple Health to keep everything in sync.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow RoundFit to access your camera to take photos of meals and log food.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow RoundFit to access your microphone for video when logging meals.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: RoundFit reads your health data to track steps, workouts, and active calories so you never have to log them manually.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: RoundFit can write body weight and nutrition entries to Apple Health to keep everything in sync.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow RoundFit to access your camera
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow RoundFit to access your microphone

plugins.photosPermission: Allow RoundFit to choose a profile photo from your library.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow RoundFit to take a photo for your profile.
